---
name: writer-structure-optimizer
description: optimize the structure of an article, report, or draft by reorganizing sections, tightening logical flow, and returning a stronger outline or revised structure plan.
---

Use this skill inside `writer` when the user asks for structure optimization rather than sentence-level polishing.

Before writing, read [references/prompt.md](references/prompt.md).

Core rules:

- focus on macro structure first
- clarify introduction, body, and conclusion roles
- improve section order, transitions, and argument buildup
- do not silently rewrite the entire document body if an outline is enough

Output:

- an optimized structure outline or structure-focused revision plan
